{{Infobox character
| name = Queen Leah I
| aliases = Queen Leah, Queen Leah the First
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen]], [[Queen Leah I]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[City of Light (novel)|City of Light]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen]] [[Leah]] I, also known as [[Queen]] [[Leah]] the First, is the monarch of [[Damasca]] and a member of its royal family. A [[Ragnarus Traveler]], she is credited with the near-total unification of [[Damasca]] and the breaking of the Ragnarus seal, an act that tied the [[Territory]] to her lineage. Her historical achievements include defeating the final [[Elysian Incarnation]] in a one-on-one fight. Physically, she is distinguished by having one blue eye and one glowing red eye, and she has been seen wearing a silver circlet and a red-and-gold gown. She carries the [[Lightning Spear]] as a symbol of her authority and possesses a commanding presence that transcends typical earthly leadership. Though she holds significant power, her position was complicated by the revelation that her father is still alive and remains the [[King]].}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|During the first year of her reign, [[Queen]] [[Leah]] I established herself as the current monarch. She is a figure with ancestral ties known to [[Valin]] and serves as a client for whom [[Overlord Indirial]] conducts business. Throughout the records, she is formally recognized as [[Queen]] [[Leah]] the First.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|It is the 1st Year in the Reign of [[Queen Leah I]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c6">''City of Light'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen]] [[Leah]] has ancestors that [[Valin]] knew.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c8">''City of Light'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen]] [[Leah]] is a person for whom [[Overlord Indirial]] performs business.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Leah]] I is the current reigning [[Queen]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c18">''City of Light'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Queen]] [[Leah]] the First is a character mentioned in the text.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c24">''City of Light'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
